notificationPreferences.title: Notification Preferences
notificationPreferences.subtitle: Manage WhatsApp automations and in-app bell notifications per clinic.
notificationPreferences.readOnly: Only users with manager permissions can change these preferences.

patientReminder.title: Patient appointment reminder
patientReminder.description: Sends WhatsApp reminders to patients with upcoming appointments.
patientReminder.timingHelp: No sensitive health details are included beyond appointment date and time.

practitionerSchedule.title: Practitioner daily schedule
practitionerSchedule.description: Sends the selected day's appointment schedule to practitioners over WhatsApp.
practitionerSchedule.timingHelp: Patient names are shortened and treatment details are not shared.

taskAssignment.title: Task assignment notification
taskAssignment.description: Sends a short WhatsApp notification when a task is assigned to a user.

paymentReminder.title: Payment reminder
paymentReminder.description: Sends WhatsApp reminders for payment plan installments approaching due date.
paymentReminder.timingHelp: The message only includes amount and due date details.

upcomingAppointments.title: Upcoming appointments
upcomingAppointments.description: Shows upcoming appointment alerts in the bell menu.

overdueTasks.title: Overdue tasks
overdueTasks.description: Shows overdue open tasks in the bell menu.

appointmentRequests.title: New appointment requests
appointmentRequests.description: Shows pending online/WhatsApp appointment requests in the bell menu.

lowStock.title: Stock alerts
lowStock.description: Shows stock alerts for items below minimum levels in the bell menu.

operatingPreferences.title: Clinic Operating Preferences
operatingPreferences.subtitle: Manage currency, date-time formats, and country presets per clinic.
operatingPreferences.saveError: Could not save clinic operating preferences.
operatingPreferences.loadError: Could not load clinic operating preferences.
operatingPreferences.readOnly: Only users with manager permissions can change these preferences.

help.regionPreset: Fills recommended values based on the selected country.
help.currency: Used as the default for new prices, payments, and finance records.
help.locale: Controls local number, currency, and date display conventions.
help.timezone: Used for appointments and automated notification timing.

booking.title: Online Booking Link
booking.description: Share this link with patients. It does not require login and allows them to create an appointment request.

services.title: Clinic Services
services.subtitle: Manage the services and treatments offered by your clinic.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Manage connection settings for your clinic communication channels.
integrations.whatsappDescription: Manage WhatsApp account connections, status, and messaging configuration.
integrations.instagramDescription: Manage Instagram account connections, status, and inbox configuration.

users.title: Users & Dentists
users.subtitle: Manage dentists and clinic staff accounts.

clinicAssignments.title: Clinic Assignments
clinicAssignments.empty: No active clinic found in this organization.

errors.loadFailed: Clinic data could not be loaded.

availability.title: Doctor Availability
availability.subtitle: Manage weekly working hours where appointments can be booked.

errors.appointmentsConflict: {{count}} active appointment(s) on {{dates}} would fall outside the new availability. You cannot close the day or restrict hours while appointments exist.

offDays.title: Off Days & Holidays
offDays.subtitle: Enter specific dates when the practitioner will not accept appointments.
offDays.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to remove this date?

errors.invalidRange: End date cannot be before start date
errors.appointmentsConflict: {{count}} active appointment(s) exist on {{date}}. A day with appointments cannot be marked as an off day or holiday.
